name: listIdentitySourceSessions
description: List all identity source sessions. Lists all identity source sessions for the given identity source instance

identitySourceId.description: The ID of the identity source for which the session is created

name: createIdentitySourceSession
description: Create an identity source session. Creates an identity source session for the given identity source instance

identitySourceId.description: The ID of the identity source for which the session is created

name: getIdentitySourceSession
description: Retrieve an identity source session. Retrieves an identity source session for a given identity source ID and session ID

identitySourceId.description: The ID of the identity source for which the session is created

sessionId.description: The ID of the identity source session

name: deleteIdentitySourceSession
description: Delete an identity source session. Deletes an identity source session for a given identity source ID and session Id

identitySourceId.description: The ID of the identity source for which the session is created

sessionId.description: The ID of the identity source session

name: uploadIdentitySourceDataForDelete
description: Upload the data to be deleted in Okta. Uploads external IDs of entities that need to be deleted in Okta from the identity source for the given session

identitySourceId.description: The ID of the identity source for which the session is created

sessionId.description: The ID of the identity source session

requestBody.description: The JSON request body. Refer to the Okta API docs for the schema.

name: uploadIdentitySourceGroupMembershipsForDelete
description: Upload the group memberships to be deleted in Okta. Uploads the group memberships that need to be deleted in Okta from the identity source for the given session

identitySourceId.description: The ID of the identity source for which the session is created

sessionId.description: The ID of the identity source session

requestBody.description: The JSON request body. Refer to the Okta API docs for the schema.

name: uploadIdentitySourceGroupMembershipsForUpsert
description: Upload the group memberships to be upserted in Okta. Uploads the group memberships that need to be inserted or updated in Okta from the identity source for the given session

identitySourceId.description: The ID of the identity source for which the session is created

sessionId.description: The ID of the identity source session

requestBody.description: The JSON request body. Refer to the Okta API docs for the schema.

name: uploadIdentitySourceGroupsDataForDelete
description: Upload the group external IDs to be deleted in Okta. Uploads external IDs of groups that need to be deleted in Okta from the identity source for the given session

identitySourceId.description: The ID of the identity source for which the session is created

sessionId.description: The ID of the identity source session

requestBody.description: The JSON request body. Refer to the Okta API docs for the schema.

name: uploadIdentitySourceGroupsForUpsert
description: Upload the group profiles without memberships to be upserted in Okta. Uploads the group profiles without memberships that need to be inserted or updated in Okta from the identity source for the given session

identitySourceId.description: The ID of the identity source for which the session is created

sessionId.description: The ID of the identity source session

requestBody.description: The JSON request body. Refer to the Okta API docs for the schema.

name: uploadIdentitySourceDataForUpsert
description: Upload the data to be upserted in Okta. Uploads entities that need to be inserted or updated in Okta from the identity source for the given session

identitySourceId.description: The ID of the identity source for which the session is created

sessionId.description: The ID of the identity source session

requestBody.description: The JSON request body. Refer to the Okta API docs for the schema.

name: startImportFromIdentitySource
description: Start the import from the identity source. Starts the import from the identity source described by the uploaded bulk operations

identitySourceId.description: The ID of the identity source for which the session is created

sessionId.description: The ID of the identity source session

name: listIdentityProviders
description: List all IdPs. Lists all identity provider (IdP) integrations with pagination. A subset of IdPs can be returned that match a supported filter expression or query.

q.description: Searches the `name` property of IdPs for matching value

after.description: The cursor to use for pagination. It is an opaque string that specifies your current location in the list and is obtained from the `Link` response header. See [Pagination](https://developer.okta.com/docs/api/#pagination).

limit.description: A limit on the number of objects to return

name: createIdentityProvider
description: Create an IdP. Creates a new identity provider (IdP) integration. #### SAML 2.0 IdP You must first add the IdP's signature certificate to the IdP key store before you can add a SAML 2.0 IdP with a `kid` credential reference. Don't use `fromURI` to automatically redirect a user to a particular app after successfully authenticating with a third-party IdP. Instead, use SAML deep links. Using `fromURI` isn't tested or supported. For more information about using deep links when signing users in usin…

requestBody.description: The JSON request body. Refer to the Okta API docs for the schema.

name: listIdentityProviderKeys
description: List all IdP key credentials. Lists all identity provider (IdP) key credentials

after.description: The cursor to use for pagination. It is an opaque string that specifies your current location in the list and is obtained from the `Link` response header. See [Pagination](https://developer.okta.com/docs/api/#pagination).

limit.description: A limit on the number of objects to return

name: createIdentityProviderKey
description: Create an IdP key credential. Creates a new X.509 certificate credential in the identity provider (IdP) key store > **Note:** RSA-based certificates are supported for all IdP types. Okta currently supports EC-based certificates only for the `X509` IdP type. For EC-based certificates we support only P-256, P-384, and P-521 curves.

requestBody.description: The JSON request body. Refer to the Okta API docs for the schema.

name: getIdentityProviderKey
description: Retrieve an IdP key credential. Retrieves a specific identity provider (IdP) key credential by `kid`

kid.description: Unique `id` of the IdP key credential

name: replaceIdentityProviderKey
description: Replace an IdP key credential. Replaces an identity provider (IdP) key credential by `kid`

kid.description: Unique `id` of the IdP key credential

requestBody.description: The JSON request body. Refer to the Okta API docs for the schema.

name: deleteIdentityProviderKey
description: Delete an IdP key credential. Deletes a specific identity provider (IdP) key credential by `kid` if it isn't currently being used by an active or inactive IdP

kid.description: Unique `id` of the IdP key credential

name: getIdentityProvider
description: Retrieve an IdP. Retrieves an identity provider (IdP) integration by `idpId`

name: replaceIdentityProvider
description: Replace an IdP. Replaces an identity provider (IdP) integration by `idpId`

requestBody.description: The JSON request body. Refer to the Okta API docs for the schema.

name: deleteIdentityProvider
description: Delete an IdP. Deletes an identity provider (IdP) integration by `idpId` * All existing IdP users are unlinked with the highest order profile source taking precedence for each IdP user. * Unlinked users keep their existing authentication provider such as `FEDERATION` or `SOCIAL`.

name: listCsrsForIdentityProvider
description: List all certificate signing requests. Lists all certificate signing requests (CSRs) for an identity provider (IdP)

name: generateCsrForIdentityProvider
description: Generate a certificate signing request. Generates a new key pair and returns a certificate signing request (CSR) for it > **Note:** The private key isn't listed in the [signing key credentials for the identity provider (IdP)](https://developer.okta.com/docs/api/openapi/okta-management/management/tag/IdentityProviderSigningKeys/#tag/IdentityProviderSigningKeys/operation/listIdentityProviderSigningKeys) until it's published.

requestBody.description: The JSON request body. Refer to the Okta API docs for the schema.

name: getCsrForIdentityProvider
description: Retrieve a certificate signing request. Retrieves a specific certificate signing request (CSR) by `id`

name: revokeCsrForIdentityProvider
description: Revoke a certificate signing request. Revokes a certificate signing request (CSR) and deletes the key pair from the identity provider (IdP)

name: publishCsrForIdentityProvider
description: Publish a certificate signing request. Publishes the certificate signing request (CSR) with a signed X.509 certificate and adds it into the signing key credentials for the identity provider (IdP) > **Notes:** > * Publishing a certificate completes the lifecycle of the CSR, and it's no longer accessible. > * If the validity period of the certificate is less than 90 days, a 400 error response is returned.

requestBody.description: The JSON request body. Refer to the Okta API docs for the schema.

name: listIdentityProviderSigningKeys
description: List all signing key credentials for IdP. Lists all signing key credentials for an identity provider (IdP)

name: listActiveIdentityProviderSigningKey
description: List the active signing key credential for IdP. Lists the active signing key credential for an identity provider (IdP)

name: generateIdentityProviderSigningKey
description: Generate a new signing key credential for IdP. Generates a new X.509 certificate for an identity provider (IdP) signing key credential to be used for signing assertions sent to the IdP. IdP signing keys are read-only. > **Note:** To update an IdP with the newly generated key credential, [update your IdP](https://developer.okta.com/docs/api/openapi/okta-management/management/tag/IdentityProvider/#tag/IdentityProvider/operation/replaceIdentityProvider) using the returned key's `kid` in the [signi…

validityYears.description: expiry of the IdP key credential

name: getIdentityProviderSigningKey
description: Retrieve a signing key credential for IdP. Retrieves a specific identity provider (IdP) key credential by `kid`

kid.description: Unique `id` of the IdP key credential

name: cloneIdentityProviderKey
description: Clone a signing key credential for IdP. Clones an X.509 certificate for an identity provider (IdP) signing key credential from a source IdP to target IdP > **Caution:** Sharing certificates isn't a recommended security practice. > **Note:** If the key is already present in the list of key credentials for the target IdP, you receive a 400 error response.

kid.description: Unique `id` of the IdP key credential

name: activateIdentityProvider
description: Activate an IdP. Activates an inactive identity provider (IdP)

name: deactivateIdentityProvider
description: Deactivate an IdP. Deactivates an active identity provider (IdP)

name: listIdentityProviderApplicationUsers
description: List all users for IdP. Lists all the users linked to an identity provider (IdP)

q.description: Searches the records for matching value

after.description: The cursor to use for pagination. It is an opaque string that specifies your current location in the list and is obtained from the `Link` response header. See [Pagination](https://developer.okta.com/docs/api/#pagination).

limit.description: A limit on the number of objects to return

name: getIdentityProviderApplicationUser
description: Retrieve a user for IdP. Retrieves a linked identity provider (IdP) user by ID

userId.description: ID of an existing Okta user

name: linkUserToIdentityProvider
description: Link a user to IdP. Links an Okta user to an existing SAML or social identity provider (IdP). The SAML IdP must have `honorPersistentNameId` set to `true` to use this API. The [Name Identifier Format](https://developer.okta.com/docs/api/openapi/okta-management/management/tag/IdentityProvider/#tag/IdentityProvider/operation/replaceIdentityProvider!path=protocol/0/settings&t=request) of the incoming assertion must be `urn:oasis:names:tc:SAML:2.0:nameid-format:persistent`.

userId.description: ID of an existing Okta user

requestBody.description: The JSON request body. Refer to the Okta API docs for the schema.

name: unlinkUserFromIdentityProvider
description: Unlink a user from IdP. Unlinks the Okta user and the identity provider (IdP) user. The next time the user federates into Okta through this IdP, they have to re-link their account according to the account link policy.

userId.description: ID of an existing Okta user

name: listSocialAuthTokens
description: List all tokens from OIDC IdP. Lists the tokens minted by the social authentication provider when the user authenticates with Okta via Social Auth. Okta doesn't import all the user information from a social provider. If the app needs information that isn't imported, it can get the user token from this endpoint. Then the app can make an API call to the social provider with the token to request the additional information.

userId.description: ID of an existing Okta user

name: listUserIdentityProviders
description: List all IdPs for user. Lists the identity providers (IdPs) associated with the user

id.description: An ID, login, or login shortname (as long as the shortname is unambiguous) of an existing Okta user
